svg.title: GitReport — full site map
svg.desc: Complete site map for GitReport showing all pages, sections, and sub-pages from unauthenticated landing through authenticated dashboard to the public-facing shared report surface.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes on the landing page?')
sendPrompt('How does the GitHub OAuth flow work?')
sendPrompt('What is the main dashboard shell?')
sendPrompt('What does the Overview section contain?')
sendPrompt('What does the Repositories tab show?')
sendPrompt('What does the Commits tab show?')
sendPrompt('How does the Share Report feature work?')
sendPrompt('How does the month selector work?')
sendPrompt('What does a public shared report page show?')
sendPrompt('How does the past reports archive work?')
